recommendations.title: La Bête Humaine
recommendations.overview: Returning by train to the French port of Le Havre, Jacques Lantier, a tormented railwayman, meets by chance the impulsive stationmaster Roubard and Séverine, his wife.

recommendations.title: The Rules of the Game
recommendations.overview: The Marquis de la Chesnaye and his wife host a weekend gala where a variety of complicated romantic and social entanglements between guests and servants lead to tragedy, all against the backdrop of a looming war.

recommendations.title: A Day in the Country
recommendations.overview: The family of a Parisian shop-owner spends a day in the country. The daughter falls in love with a man at the inn, where they spend the day.

recommendations.title: La Chienne
recommendations.overview: Cashier Maurice Legrand is married to the wretched Adele. By chance, he meets Lucienne, 'Lulu', and makes her his mistress. He thinks he has finally found love, but Lulu is a streetwalker, still in love with her pimp.

recommendations.title: French Cancan
recommendations.overview: Nineteenth-century Paris comes vibrantly alive in Jean Renoir’s exhilarating tale of the opening of the world-renowned Moulin Rouge. Jean Gabin plays the wily impresario Danglard, who makes the cancan all the rage while juggling the love of two beaut

recommendations.title: Taxi for Tobruk
recommendations.overview: During World War II, French Commandos join forces with a German officer in order to survive the African desert.

recommendations.title: Saving Private Ryan
recommendations.overview: As U.S. troops storm the beaches of Normandy, three brothers lie dead on the battlefield, with a fourth trapped behind enemy lines. Ranger captain John Miller and seven men are tasked with penetrating German-held territory and bringing the boy home.

recommendations.title: Escape to Victory
recommendations.overview: A group of POWs in a German prison camp during World War II play the German National Soccer Team in this powerful film depicting the role of prisoners during wartime.

recommendations.title: The Great Escape
recommendations.overview: The Nazis, exasperated at the number of escapes from their prison camps by a relatively small number of Allied prisoners, relocate them to a high-security 'escape-proof' camp to sit out the remainder of the war. Undaunted, the prisoners plan one of t

recommendations.title: Kelly's Heroes
recommendations.overview: A misfit group of World War II American soldiers goes AWOL to rob a bank behind German lines.
